attributes.name: Piano
attributes.summary: The exported "Piano" component defines a virtual, interactive three-octave piano interface with real-time sound synthesis and notation recording capabilities. Its primary purpose is to enable users to play notes via on-screen keys or keyboard input, record sequences, and visualize or play back notation. The component supports real-time audio output, notation editing, notation-to-keyboard translation, and playback control, facilitating both performance and learning interactions with a musical instrument in a UI setting. It also offers multiple responsive display formats with detailed visualizations and controls for enhanced user experience.
